content:
I’m excited to announce that my personal website is now live! After years of having a simple static site, I decided it was time for an upgrade to something more modern and maintainable.
What’s New The site has been completely rebuilt using Hugo, a fast and flexible static site generator, combined with the clean and minimalist PaperMod theme. This gives the site a fresh, professional look while keeping things simple and performant.
The Setup For those interested in the technical side:
Static Site Generator: Hugo Theme: PaperMod (lightweight, no dependencies) Hosting: GitHub Pages Content: Written in Markdown for easy updates The entire site is version-controlled on GitHub, making it easy to track changes and maintain the codebase over time.
What You’ll Find Right now, the site features:
About/Home - A brief intro about what I do Projects - Showcasing my app development projects including Bible Reader, Racquet Stringer, and HushSMS Blog - Where I’ll be sharing thoughts and updates (like this post!) In Development This is just the beginning! The site is actively being developed and improved. Some things on the horizon:
More detailed project documentation Regular blog posts about development topics Enhanced project demos and links Additional customization and refinement If you notice anything that could be improved or have suggestions, feel free to reach out. I’m always open to feedback!
Thanks for stopping by, and I hope you find the projects interesting.
summary:
I’m excited to announce that my personal website is now live! After years of having a simple static site, I decided it was time for an upgrade to something more modern and maintainable.

What’s New

The site has been completely rebuilt using Hugo, a fast and flexible static site generator, combined with the clean and minimalist PaperMod theme. This gives the site a fresh, professional look while keeping things simple and performant.
title: Website Launch - Everything in Development

content:
A powerful Bible reading app designed for in-depth study with support for multiple languages and Bible translation versions.
Features Multiple Languages - Read Scripture in your preferred language Multiple Translations - Access different Bible versions side-by-side Offline Support - Download translations for offline reading Search & Navigation - Quickly find passages and topics Notes & Bookmarks - Mark favorite passages and add personal notes Clean Interface - Distraction-free reading experience Tech Stack Cross-platform mobile app (iOS/Android) Modern UI framework Local database for offline support Links GitHub Repository - View the source code Learn More - Detailed documentation Whether you’re a theology student, pastor, or just someone who enjoys reading Scripture, Bible Reader provides a modern, intuitive way to explore God’s Word across different languages and translations.
summary:
A powerful Bible reading app designed for in-depth study with support for multiple languages and Bible translation versions.

Features

  • Multiple Languages - Read Scripture in your preferred language
  • Multiple Translations - Access different Bible versions side-by-side
  • Offline Support - Download translations for offline reading
  • Search & Navigation - Quickly find passages and topics
  • Notes & Bookmarks - Mark favorite passages and add personal notes
  • Clean Interface - Distraction-free reading experience

Tech Stack

  • Cross-platform mobile app (iOS/Android)
  • Modern UI framework
  • Local database for offline support

Links

  • GitHub Repository - View the source code
  • Learn More - Detailed documentation

Whether you’re a theology student, pastor, or just someone who enjoys reading Scripture, Bible Reader provides a modern, intuitive way to explore God’s Word across different languages and translations.
title: Bible Reader

content:
A simple, text-only private messaging app for Android that brings military-grade encryption to your everyday SMS communications.
Features End-to-End Encryption - All messages are encrypted using industry-standard algorithms Text-Only Design - Focused, minimal interface for pure messaging Native SMS Integration - Works with Android’s built-in SMS facilities No Account Required - No registration, login, or online account needed Privacy First - No data collection, no ads, no tracking Message Self-Destruct - Optional automatic message deletion Contact Management - Secure your contacts with encryption Open Source - Transparent code for security auditing Tech Stack Android native development End-to-end encryption (AES-256) SMS-based communication No external servers required Links GitHub Repository - View the source code Google Play Store - Download the app Learn More - Security documentation In a world where privacy matters, HushSMS offers a straightforward solution for secure text messaging without the complexity. Your messages, your privacy, your control.
summary:
A simple, text-only private messaging app for Android that brings military-grade encryption to your everyday SMS communications.

Features

  • End-to-End Encryption - All messages are encrypted using industry-standard algorithms
  • Text-Only Design - Focused, minimal interface for pure messaging
  • Native SMS Integration - Works with Android’s built-in SMS facilities
  • No Account Required - No registration, login, or online account needed
  • Privacy First - No data collection, no ads, no tracking
  • Message Self-Destruct - Optional automatic message deletion
  • Contact Management - Secure your contacts with encryption
  • Open Source - Transparent code for security auditing

Tech Stack

  • Android native development
  • End-to-end encryption (AES-256)
  • SMS-based communication
  • No external servers required

Links

  • GitHub Repository - View the source code
  • Google Play Store - Download the app
  • Learn More - Security documentation

In a world where privacy matters, HushSMS offers a straightforward solution for secure text messaging without the complexity. Your messages, your privacy, your control.
title: HushSMS

content:
A comprehensive job management app built specifically for professional racquet stringers to track, organize, and manage their restringing jobs efficiently.
Features Job Tracking - Log all restringing jobs with customer details Multiple Sports - Support for Tennis, Badminton, and Squash racquets Customer Management - Maintain customer profiles and preferences Service History - Track stringing history for each racquet Pricing Calculator - Built-in pricing and quote generation Invoice Generation - Professional invoices for customers Statistics & Analytics - Track productivity and revenue Offline Mode - Work without internet connection Tech Stack Mobile-first design (iOS/Android) Local database for job storage Cloud sync for backups Links GitHub Repository - View the source code Learn More - User guide and documentation Designed by stringers, for stringers. Racquet Stringer helps you streamline your business operations and focus on what you do best - creating perfectly strung racquets.
summary:
A comprehensive job management app built specifically for professional racquet stringers to track, organize, and manage their restringing jobs efficiently.

Features

  • Job Tracking - Log all restringing jobs with customer details
  • Multiple Sports - Support for Tennis, Badminton, and Squash racquets
  • Customer Management - Maintain customer profiles and preferences
  • Service History - Track stringing history for each racquet
  • Pricing Calculator - Built-in pricing and quote generation
  • Invoice Generation - Professional invoices for customers
  • Statistics & Analytics - Track productivity and revenue
  • Offline Mode - Work without internet connection

Tech Stack

  • Mobile-first design (iOS/Android)
  • Local database for job storage
  • Cloud sync for backups

Links

  • GitHub Repository - View the source code
  • Learn More - User guide and documentation

Designed by stringers, for stringers. Racquet Stringer helps you streamline your business operations and focus on what you do best - creating perfectly strung racquets.
title: Racquet Stringer
